title: Workflows missing in UI after PostgreSQL instability
symptom: Users see 'Workflow Not Found' when trying to access workflows in the UI, despite them running in the background.
applies_when: PostgreSQL instability occurred after an update
not_this_if: Workflows are accessible in the UI
No PostgreSQL instability prior to the issue
root_cause: The issue arises from an incompatibility in the metadata reading/indexing layer of the n8n application after a PostgreSQL update, which prevents the UI from retrieving existing workflows stored in the database.
fix_steps: Copy the workflow JSON from the 'workflow_entity' table in PostgreSQL.
Paste the JSON into the n8n UI to create a new workflow.
Save the workflow in the UI.
agent_instruction: Copy the workflow JSON from the database and import it into the n8n UI.
safety_notes: Ensure to back up the database before making changes.
